description: Chunky wedges with a 70's twist - this piece is a modern reinterpretation of the funky vintage aesthetic. Style this with girly outfits it goes perfectly for a vintage vibe with the wood referenced heel and the floral straps. Heel: 4" Upper Fabric floral printed fore foot and midfoot straps Padded synthetic footbed with a heel patch Outsole TPR wedge heel with chipped out details on the sides Textured check patterns on the outsole shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
